title: T-026 — UI: FA Technical tab shell (allergen widget hooks added in NPD-c)
prompt:
# T-026 — FA Technical tab shell

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §5.7, §8.7 + UX fa_technical_tab
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:656-743 (fa_technical_tab)

## Goal
Technical tab shell rendering shelf_life + closed_technical fields (NPD-a baseline) plus a placeholder slot for the allergen widget that NPD-c will populate.

## Implementation contract
New apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/technical-tab.tsx using SchemaDrivenForm for shelf_life + closed_technical, plus a TechnicalAllergenSlot component that renders an empty Card with 'Allergens loading...' until NPD-c lands. Save uses updateFaCell.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/technical-tab.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/_tabs/__tests__/technical-tab.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the tab renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/fa-screens.jsx:656-743 (fa_technical_tab), then it shows the same field order (shelf_life, allergens slot, may-contain slot, override controls, closed_technical) and uses shadcn Form+Card+Input+Select primitives — verified by RTL parity checklist (structural+visual+interaction)
2. Given user edits shelf_life and saves, when updateFaCell completes, then DB row is updated
3. Given the allergen slot has no data yet, when rendered, then a Card with 'Allergens loading...' appears (no error)

## Test strategy
- RED: 3 RTL tests for parity, save action, slot placeholder
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test technical-tab'

## Risk red lines
- Do not implement allergen cascade here (NPD-c)
- Do not skip slot reservation for allergens
- Do not bypass updateFaCell

pipeline_inputs.description: Technical tab shell with shelf_life + closed_technical + reserved allergen widget slot.
pipeline_inputs.details: Parity: shelf_life, allergens slot, may-contain slot, override controls placeholder, closed_technical, in fa_technical_tab order. shadcn primitives.
